title: Not actual news thread
wikitext:
[]: Not actual news thread             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Sep 02, 2014 9:10 am Is it a good idea to have a thread for probably not news but related things? Or would that just be spam? Anyway Yamashita tweeted this: https://twitter.com/ikuto_yamashita/status/506737101245669377 Note the fat volume on the shelf below the intended photo target シンエヴァ 山下いくと シンエヴァ status upgraded to HAPPENING

[]:             Quote Post by obliterates » Tue Sep 02, 2014 9:17 am シンエヴァ 山下いくと シンエヴァ status upgraded to HAPPENING

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Sep 02, 2014 9:27 am “シンエヴァ” translates into “New Eva." "山下いくと” is romanized as “Yamashita”, as in Ikuto Yamashita, the mech designer for the Evangelion franchise. What’s important to note is that “New Eva” is a title specific for the advertisements for “FINAL.” Prior to this, the NTE movies like Jo, Ha, and Q have always been called “Evangelion New Theatrical Editions” as opposed to “New Evangelion Theatrical Edition,” suggesting that something even newer than Q will be introduced to the Eva franchise will be presented in “FINAL.” “New Eva Yamashita” indicates that the Evangelion Units themselves could have already been completed for “FINAL.”

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Sep 02, 2014 9:29 am シンエヴァ is the commonly used short version of what is as far as we know the official title of Final: シン・エヴァンゲリオン劇場版 http://evangelion.co.jp/final.html That book appears to be Yamashita's copy of whatever material is used internally for the production. EDIT: FreakyFilmFan4ever, because Shin is given in katakana and not kanji we can not say with certainty they mean it as "new" Eva. Shin could also mean "True/real/genuine" Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Sep 02, 2014 9:30 am That's a big book for the Eva unit designs we have here, so far the only ones stated to appear are 8+2, the MP-Evas and probably EVA-01. Does that mean that we'll get more Evas in FINAL? Maybe the missing Units (7 and 10-12) or others ADAM's Vessels if that figure of Awakened Mark.09 is anything to go by?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Sep 02, 2014 9:34 am The book having Yamashita's name on it does not necessarily mean it is all his work. It is far more likely to be a common internal reference book of all the needed material so far but because that needs to be kept under wraps and leaks need to be traced each staff's copy has their name stamped on it.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Sep 02, 2014 9:44 am Don't worry, it was just spontaneous fanwankery to pass time! Although I would suggest Yamashita to hide that book in a safe, 'cause that tweet might give some people ideas, it would be inconvenient to have a leakage by cause of rabid fan burglar!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Sep 02, 2014 9:54 am Given the false ceiling and the tons of shelves I would suspect that's from inside khara and not his personal home.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Sep 02, 2014 10:00 am Just to know, what's exactly the focus of that tweet: the Space Battleship Yamato 2199 figures, or did Yamashita wanted to troll/hype us up with the Eva book? Or both?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Sep 02, 2014 11:22 am Just a note: Related news threads like this is totally fine as long as it doesn't get spammy/off-topic (try to keep it about Studio khara Staff). Carry on!

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Tue Sep 02, 2014 2:12 pm Sorry for going off topic, I'm really curious about ElMariachi wrote: figure of Awakened Mark.09

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Sep 02, 2014 3:35 pm Oh God. I know the film is in the making, but it's good to see actual proof.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Sep 02, 2014 3:58 pm A.T. Fish wrote: Is it official? Is there some link with an image of it? I looked in the Eva figures thread and found nothing.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Sep 02, 2014 4:30 pm I'm in favor of this thread remaining. Nothing wrong with a hype train as long as it doesn't get derailed.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Sep 02, 2014 4:36 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: I'm in favor of this thread remaining.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Sep 02, 2014 4:38 pm I blame the shitty computer I'm using while mine is in the shop-- didn't see your post.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Sep 02, 2014 6:57 pm BREAKING NON-NEWS, YAMASHITA REPLIED TO SOMEONE POINTING OUT THE BOOK https://twitter.com/ikuto_yamashita/status/506848750526951425

[]:             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Tue Sep 02, 2014 7:21 pm THIS JUST (NOT) IN: YAMASHITA'S REPLY SAYS "Translating..."!!! (courtesy of Google Translate) ...DAMN YOU, INTERNET EXPLORER 7!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Sep 02, 2014 7:26 pm Wasn't anything too enlightening (obviously, hehe), pretty much confirming it's notes like TM 's post earlier mentioned. And something about how "Eva sin sounds like a cute animal compilation" (I so don't get it).

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Sep 04, 2014 7:01 pm Oh, that’s the only part you don’t understand? I’m just gonna drop what Google Translate gave me. Please to mind (like animal knitting cute Eva Sin Toka winding trilogy heaven Eva Sin) other files if it has reflected rather
